'''jazanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiamycin|xiamycin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiamycin|xiamycin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jazanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæzængæth|jæzængæth]] || [[word:jæzængæj|jæzængæj]] || [[word:jæzængæsh|jæzængæsh]] || [[word:jæzængæ|jæzængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazazangath|jazazangath]] || [[word:jazazangaj|jazazangaj]] || [[word:jazazangash|jazazangash]] || [[word:jazazanga|jazazanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazangath|jazangath]] || [[word:jazangaj|jazangaj]] || [[word:jazangash|jazangash]] || [[word:jazanga|jazanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazafngath|jazafngath]] || [[word:jazafngaj|jazafngaj]] || [[word:jazafngash|jazafngash]] || [[word:jazafngaf|jazafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jazangatha|jazangatha]] || [[word:jazangaja|jazangaja]] || [[word:jazangasha|jazangasha]] || [[word:jazangaka|jazangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jazangath|jazangath]] || [[word:jazangaj|jazangaj]] || [[word:jazangash|jazangash]] || [[word:jazanga|jazanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jazangathal|jazangathal]] || [[word:jazangajal|jazangajal]] || [[word:jazangashal|jazangashal]] || [[word:jazangakal|jazangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jazangathatha|jazangathatha]] || [[word:jazangajaja|jazangajaja]] || [[word:jazangashasha|jazangashasha]] || [[word:jazangaka|jazangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jazangathan|jazangathan]] || [[word:jazangajan|jazangajan]] || [[word:jazangashan|jazangashan]] || [[word:jazangakan|jazangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jazangathaoro|jazangathaoro]] || [[word:jazangajaoro|jazangajaoro]] || [[word:jazangashaoro|jazangashaoro]] || [[word:jazangakaoro|jazangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
